steps.title: Follow the central claim
steps.content: The narrator says people love light and life, then uses that trait to explain why people crowd into towns and cities. The descriptions of fear at night and longing for human voices support that explanation.

steps.title: Avoid supporting details
steps.content: Choice A turns the child comparison into the main point, Choice B adds a warning the text never gives, and Choice D reverses the passage by making the countryside preferable. The text explains traits that draw people toward urban life. The answer is C.
